title: lithospermum fruticosum var. suave
intro: Lithospermum fruticosum var. suave, commonly known as Blue Spurflower or Blue Lobelia, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to Western Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. It is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Lithospermum fruticosum var. suave can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
